title: Starting a Candle Business
detail: A friend who majors in business and I are testing whether we can scale a simple but saturated product idea.

title: Writing a trilogy based on modern events
detail: I am writing a trilogy inspired by recent events and metaphysical ideas. One book focuses on metaphysics, another on theory, and the third may merge both themes. I plan to self-publish on Kindle.

title: Building an education channel on YouTube
detail: I have met many people working hard to make education, especially STEM, more accessible. I want to contribute through a YouTube channel focused on technical lessons and practical academic advice.
